(1 comment)

Alex, you might consider to add a patch with a change in check_and_cleanup_lustre() that looks for large files or directories left behind at the end of testing, like:

 check_and_cleanup_lustre() {

        if is_mounted $MOUNT; then
                echo "checking $MOUNT for large files and dirs"
                $LFS find $MOUNT/* -type d -blocks +64k -printf "%b %p"
                $LFS find $MOUNT -type f -blocks +1M -printf "%b %p"

                if $DO_CLEANUP; then
                :

Initially this would just print out a list of names, but after any such files/dirs found are all fixed up, then it could be changed into an error?

This also adds a bit of useful testing for "lfs find -printf".
